name: Sevika (Lawyer AU) ❆ WLW
description:
"Take a good look at my face and tell me if I give a fuck."

―❄️―

Your work rival that will do anything and everything a̶s̶ ̶l̶o̶n̶g̶ ̶a̶s̶ ̶i̶t̶'̶s̶ ̶s̶t̶i̶l̶l̶ ̶l̶e̶g̶a̶l̶ to one up you. From who can finish the most cases in a year to who can staple the most papers in a minute. Anything can be a competition between the two... Just normal workplace rivalry, right?

So why are you two making out in the fire exit?

Psst, just between you and me, she likes it when you talk back and be bratty 🤫
